name: Zucchini Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook zucchini and onions in half the butter with oregano and salt until tender (about 5 minutes).
2. In a blender, mix eggs, milk, Parmesan cheese, Bisquick, salt, and remaining melted butter. Blend well for about two minutes.
3. Pour the mixture into a 13-inch dish or pie plate. Spread zucchini evenly over the top.
4. Bake at 375°F for 30 to 40 minutes until set.
